name: Surge Battery Metals Inc.
description: Surge Battery Metals Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on advancing its flagship Nevada North Lithium Project in the United States. The company is dedicated to securing American energy independence by developing high-grade lithium clay resources to support the growing electric vehicle and battery supply chain. Through strategic partnerships and a commitment to responsible, sustainable mining practices, Surge aims to provide a long-term, domestic source of lithium while maintaining industry-leading environmental standards and creating significant economic opportunities in the region.
